title: Jousting Spears
description: This pack adds Jousting Spears to Minecraft!
body:
# Jousting Spears

This pack changes the texture of **all types of spears**, replacing them with **jousting spears**.

![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8bdf4b8546b5489322365ff52f92cf8096a3df8.png)

This pack is ideal for creating challenges and battles on horseback, as well as giving the **zombie horseman** a more appealing look!

**I hope you like it!**

Lordd727
